summary: Completed additional matching work for the Freezer item by replacing several placeholder/UNK function declarations with typed C implementations and adding the item-specific attribute and item-var structs needed by those functions. The PR updated itfreezer.c, itfreezer.h, itCommonItems.h, and the Item xDD4_itemVar union in types.h. Evidence for the claimed 100% status comes from the PR title and diff; no review comments or explanatory body were present in the provided slice.
what_changed: Added itfreezertAttributes in itCommonItems.h with four f32 fields x0, x4, x8, and xC used as Freezer special attributes.
Added itfreezer_ItemVars in itCommonItems.h, including padding from item var offset DD4 to E34 and an s32 x60 timer/counter field.
Added itfreezer_ItemVars freezer to the Item::xDD4_itemVar union in src/melee/it/types.h.
Implemented it_802CCF9C to initialize Freezer state: clears facing_dir and item command variables, transitions through it_802CD2EC, and calls it_80279CDC using attrs->x0.

Implemented it_802CD090 as an accessory/update callback that conditionally spawns effect/action 0x462 when xDB0_itcmd_var1 is set, then manages the freezer.x60 countdown and periodically calls it_8027ADEC with ID 0x461.
Implemented it_802CD12C to switch to item animation state 2, install hitlag pause/resume callbacks, set on_accessory to it_802CD290, and clear xDB0_itcmd_var1.
Added a static helper itFreezer_UnkMotion2_Anim_Inline that duplicates the state-2 setup used by it_802CD12C, apparently to satisfy matching/inlining behavior.
Implemented itFreezer_UnkMotion2_Anim to call it_80272C6C, re-enter state-2 setup when that returns 0, and despawn/finish when item pos.y exceeds Stage_GetBlastZoneTopOffset.
Implemented itFreezer_UnkMotion2_Phys to react to xDAC_itcmd_var0 by setting vertical velocity from attrs->x4 and enabling xDB0_itcmd_var1, then apply attrs->x8 to y velocity while that flag is set.
Implemented it_802CD290 as a second countdown/accessory callback that periodically calls it_8027ADEC with ID 0x461 based on freezer.x60 and attrs->xC.

Implemented itFreezer_UnkMotion0_Phys plus two static inline-style helpers to transition from grounded/initial physics via it_8027A09C, call it_80273454, set freezer.x60 to -1, enter item animation state 1, install hitlag callbacks, set on_accessory to it_802CD090, and set xDD1_flag.b1.
Updated itfreezer.h prototypes for it_802CD090 and it_802CD290 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void functions taking Item_GObj*.
Added include of gr/stage.h in itfreezer.c for Stage_GetBlastZoneTopOffset.
smart_moves: Introduced typed Freezer-specific structs before using xC4_article_data->x4_specialAttributes and xDD4_itemVar.freezer, avoiding hard-coded raw offsets in the implemented functions.

Preserved likely compiler matching behavior by extracting repeated state setup into static helper functions with inline-style names, especially for itFreezer_UnkMotion2_Anim and itFreezer_UnkMotion0_Phys.
Converted unknown header prototypes to concrete Item_GObj* signatures only where implementations made the types evident.
Used existing item callback patterns consistently: Item_80268E5C for animation state changes, efLib_PauseAll/efLib_ResumeAll for hitlag callbacks, and on_accessory for periodic effect/timer behavior.
Pulled in the stage header rather than leaving Stage_GetBlastZoneTopOffset implicitly declared or routed through placeholders.
decomp_lessons: When an item has per-instance data under Item::xDD4_itemVar, adding a named union member can make multiple behavior functions match cleanly and improves future readability.
Article special attributes should be represented as an item-specific attributes struct once field usage is known, even if fields remain named by offset such as x0/x4/x8/xC.
Repeated setup sequences in decompiled item code may need to be factored into static helpers to reproduce original inlining and codegen rather than simply deduplicated for style.
Item command variables such as xDAC_itcmd_var0 and xDB0_itcmd_var1 can act as script-driven flags that bridge animation commands, physics updates, and accessory callbacks.
Blast-zone checks for item lifetime or animation completion may require including gr/stage.h and using Stage_GetBlastZoneTopOffset.
Timer fields initialized from item attributes, here freezer.x60 from attrs->xC, can drive periodic accessory effects; modeling the timer explicitly helps avoid opaque offset arithmetic.
naming_conventions: The PR used the project’s existing item function naming style for still-unknown symbols: it_802CCF9C, it_802CD090, it_802CD12C, and it_802CD290.
Freezer motion callbacks follow the existing pattern itFreezer_UnkMotionN_Anim, itFreezer_UnkMotionN_Phys, and itFreezer_UnkMotionN_Coll.

Static helper names were given explicit inline markers such as itFreezer_UnkMotion2_Anim_Inline and itFreezer_UnkMotion0_Phys_inline1/inline2, signaling matching-driven helper extraction rather than stable API names.
Struct field names remain offset-based placeholders, such as itfreezertAttributes.x0/x4/x8/xC and itfreezer_ItemVars.x60, because semantic names were not established in the evidence.
Header prototypes use Item_GObj* for item callbacks once known, replacing UNK_RET and UNK_PARAMS.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replaced placeholder markers such as /// #it_802CCF9C, /// #it_802CD090, /// #itFreezer_UnkMotion2_Anim, /// #itFreezer_UnkMotion2_Phys, /// #it_802CD290, and /// #itFreezer_UnkMotion0_Phys with C implementations.
Used static helper functions to shape inlining/code layout around state transition sequences, a common matching tactic visible from helper names containing Inline/inline.
Included an explicit cast in itFreezer_UnkMotion2_Phys, `(u32) item->xDB0_itcmd_var1 != false`, likely to match comparison/codegen behavior.
Maintained simple boolean return forms in motion/collision callbacks, including returning 1/0 in itFreezer_UnkMotion2_Anim based on the blast-zone comparison.
Used exact effect/action IDs 0x461 and 0x462 and scale 1.4f in it_8027ADEC calls, preserving constants from the target behavior.
follow_up_queries: Look for later PRs that rename itfreezertAttributes fields x0/x4/x8/xC or itfreezer_ItemVars.x60 to semantic names.
Check whether the lowercase/t-suffixed type name itfreezertAttributes was later normalized to a project naming convention.
Search for follow-up work on itfreezer.c to see whether UnkMotion names or numeric symbols were resolved.
Compare this PR with neighboring item decomp PRs that add xDD4_itemVar union members for reusable item-var struct patterns.
Verify final match reports or map data for itfreezer after this PR, since the provided slice contains no explicit match report beyond the title.
